title: NovelTools project YAML
description: Schema for noveltools.yaml (or custom project file). Paths are relative to the directory containing this file. Each chapter is a folder; optional scenes list gives custom order (otherwise .md files are discovered alphabetically).

chapters.description: Ordered list of chapters. Each chapter is a folder: either a folder path (string) or an object with required folder, optional title, and optional scenes (custom order).

oneOf.description: Folder path; .md files inside are discovered in alphabetical order.

title.description: Optional chapter title (defaults to folder name).

folder.description: Folder path relative to project file directory.

scenes.description: Optional. Scene filenames (or paths relative to folder) in custom order. When present, only these scenes are used, in this order.

sceneStatus.description: Optional. Maps scene path (relative) to status: done (green), drafted (yellow), spiked (red).
